justification: All 5 ACs are implemented with correct HTTP status codes and error code strings (400 INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT, 404 USER_NOT_FOUND, 200 idempotent, 409 EMAIL_ALREADY_IN_USE, 200 with updated user). AC5 same-email idempotency is correctly distinguished from AC2 conflict — the guard order explicitly places AC5 (step 3, short-circuit on same email with no DB write) before AC2 (step 4, findByEmail for different-user conflict). No external validation library is mentioned. Tests use one describe block per AC covering all 5, plus a guard-ordering block. The acceptance_criteria_coverage mapping is implicit ('one describe per AC') rather than an explicit AC→test-name map, and files_changed is provided as a table rather than a structured list — both are present but loosely formatted.
